mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lb_work_place ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM lb_work_place ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM lb_work_place WHERE used = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM lb_work_place WHERE used = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lb_work_place WHERE used = 1
SELECT * FROM lb_work_place WHERE place LIKE '%' + #{place} + '%' AND used = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lb_work_place WHERE place LIKE '%' + #{place} + '%' AND used = 1
SELECT * FROM lb_work_place WHERE floor = #{floor} AND used = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lb_work_place WHERE floor = #{floor} AND used = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lb_work_place (title, place, floor, used, company, coordinate, image_path, exist_id, is_exist, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{place}, #{floor}, #{used}, #{company}, #{coordinate}, #{imagePath}, #{existId}, #{isExist}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE lb_work_place SET title = #{title}, place = #{place}, floor = #{floor}, used = #{used}, company = #{company}, coordinate = #{coordinate}, image_path = #{imagePath}, exist_id = #{existId}, is_exist = #{isExist}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
